channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Disciplinary hearings to determine Swanepoel’s cricketing future
item.description: Beyers Swanepoel faces a critical week as the outcome of disciplinary processes with Cricket South Africa (CSA) and the Central Gauteng Lions will determine his immediate future as a professional cric...

item.title: Tribute to Steven Gruzd: Esteemed South African Political Scientist and Thoughtful Friend
item.description: Steven Gruzd, a respected South African political scientist and commentator, recently passed away in tragic circumstances, leaving a notable void in the nation's political analysis community. Known fo...

item.title: Seun Okinbaloye respond calmly to Wike’s controversial comment, stress need for press freedom in democracy
item.description: Channels Television presenter Seun Okinbaloye don finally talk about the recent wahala wey involve Minister of the Federal Capital Territory, Nyesom Wike. The matter start after Wike talk say if e get...

item.title: Missing Kerala Trekker Found Safe After Four-Day Search in Tadiandamol Hills
item.description: A 36-year-old woman from Kerala, G. S. Sharanya, who was reported missing during a trek in the Tadiandamol Hills of Karnataka’s Kodagu district, was found safe after an extensive four-day search opera...

item.title: Melon Digital and Airalo launch eSIM partnership to enhance mobile connectivity for tourists in South Africa
item.description: Melon Digital has announced a landmark partnership with Airalo, one of the world’s leading providers of international eSIM technology, aimed at improving how visitors to South Africa stay connected. T...

item.title: INEC suspends publicity and logistics for planned voter revalidation exercise
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) don announce say make all Resident Electoral Commissioners (RECs) across the country stop the publicity and logistics work wey dem bin dey do for t...

item.title: Leeds beat West Ham on penalties to reach FA Cup semi-final
item.description: In a thrilling FA Cup quarter-final at the London Stadium, Leeds United defeated West Ham United in a penalty shootout after a dramatic comeback from the home side. Leeds initially took a 2-0 lead wit...

item.title: Energy CS Addresses KSh 4.8 Billion Substandard Fuel Investigation
item.description: On Sunday, April 5, Energy and Petroleum CS Opiyo Wandayi addressed the ongoing probe into KSh 4.8 billion worth of substandard fuel in Kenya. He revealed that the government stopped the delivery of a...

item.title: CM Stalin Confident of DMK's Prospects in Tamil Nadu Assembly Election
item.description: In a recent interview with The Hindu on April 5, 2026, Tamil Nadu Chief Minister and DMK president M.K. Stalin expressed strong confidence regarding the upcoming Assembly elections. He clarified that ...

item.title: Sokoto Senator Ibrahim Lamido resigns from APC over insecurity and economic hardship
item.description: Senator Ibrahim Lamido, wey dey represent Sokoto East for National Assembly, don resign from the All Progressives Congress (APC) as e talk say the level of insecurity and hardship for Nigeria don pass...

item.title: Microsoft Clarifies Copilot’s Intended Use in Updated Terms of Service
item.description: Microsoft has clarified that its AI tool, Copilot, is currently labeled in its terms of service as 'for entertainment purposes only.' The disclaimer highlights that Copilot can make errors and may not...

item.title: Peter Phillips and Harriet Sperling join family for Easter service at Windsor
item.description: Peter Phillips, the eldest grandchild of Queen Elizabeth II, attended the Easter Sunday service at St George’s Chapel in Windsor alongside his fiancée Harriet Sperling and their children, marking thei...

item.title: Several migrants feared missing following Mediterranean boat accident, NGOs report
item.description: Several humanitarian organizations reported that a migrant vessel capsized in the Mediterranean Sea, leaving an unknown number of people missing. The groups, including Mediterranea Saving Humans and S...

item.title: Trump signals possible extension of Iran deadline through vague social media post
item.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump posted a message online that seems to suggest an extension of a key deadline involving Iran, though the post itself was ambiguous. Analysts are interpreting the mess...

item.title: CBCP calls on Catholics to reflect on peace amid global conflicts this Easter
item.description: On Easter Sunday, the Catholic Bishops’ Conference of the Philippines (CBCP) encouraged Filipino Catholics to use the Easter season as a time for deeper reflection on the meaning of peace. CBCP Presid...

item.title: PSV Eindhoven Clinches 27th Dutch League Championship With Five Games Left
item.description: PSV Eindhoven don once again confirm demself as top dogs for Dutch football as dem win the Eredivisie for the 27th time. Dem secure the title with five games still dey remain after Feyenoord, wey dey ...

item.title: Trump’s Interest in Canadian Territory Tempered by Respect for King Charles, Says Royal Commentator
item.description: According to a forthcoming book by British journalist Robert Hardman, former U.S. President Donald Trump expressed interest in acquiring Canadian territory just north of the U.S. border. Hardman’s boo...

item.title: Incorporating Competition Improves Accuracy in Digital Brain Models
item.description: Creating personalized digital 'twins' of the human brain is a major goal in neuroscience and medicine. These models aim to simulate individual brain activity and responses to stimuli, diseases, or tre...

item.title: Family and Community Pay Tribute to 13-Year-Old Noah Campbell After Fatal Collision in Bedfordshire
item.description: The family of 13-year-old Noah Campbell, who tragically lost his life in a road collision in Flitwick, Bedfordshire, have paid heartfelt tribute to him. They described Noah as a 'fun, bright, handsome...

item.title: Tensions rise as Iran releases footage of US aircraft and Trump signals potential deal
item.description: On Monday, April 6, 2026, tensions in the Middle East escalated as US President Donald Trump issued a strongly worded threat to Iran, demanding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday night (...
